scope.summary: Mirror hosted Zalo media URLs into encrypted cloud object storage so desktop cloud downloads do not depend on expiring remote URLs.
goals: Fetch only bounded HTTP(S) media URLs from hosted message rich file metadata
Encrypt mirrored media bytes with per-file keys before writing S3-compatible object storage
Persist mirrored file metadata in Postgres and attach the cloud file id to encrypted message rich metadata
Keep desktop cloud download using the existing cloud file API without returning Zalo credentials or plaintext blobs in logs
nonGoals: Full background retry queue with exponential backoff

acceptance.description: Hosted message media href bytes can be fetched, encrypted, written to object storage, and downloaded/decrypted through the existing file blob endpoint.

verification.manual: Attach backend unit or integration evidence proving mirrored bytes roundtrip and object-store bytes do not contain known plaintext.

acceptance.description: Mirrored hosted message rich metadata includes a cloud file id so desktop cloud mode downloads via backend instead of opening the remote Zalo URL.

verification.manual: Attach tests or static evidence for rich metadata mutation plus frontend hydration/download gates.
